scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('Cleaned .next cache');"
scripts.check:node: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major>22||major<18) { console.warn('\n⚠️  Next.js 15 is stable on Node 18/20/22 LTS. Current:', process.version, '\n'); }"
scripts.dev: npm run check:node && npm run clean && next dev
